title: podman remote client -- add rmi
body:
allow the podman remote client to delete images

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

> @baude No tests?

I've pushed a sep commit from another branch I had so they are here now ... I'm not sure if we should combine them or leap frog due to size.  But this was reasonable in size.
lets merge this and @jwhonce and I can come up with a decent variable name in the next PR.  We tossed around activeRuntime/adapterRuntime
Fix up all the import mess and change back to runtime, and we can merge.
